creator: jiashiun@gmail.com
text:
net/mpich2 was marked MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE while at v1.1.1p1 in r244447.

According to mpich2 wiki FAQ[1], this issue was fixed since v1.5a1. Ports version is v1.5_3,5 now, so it probably worth giving it another try.

[1]: https://wiki.mpich.org/mpich/index.php/Frequently_Asked_Questions#Q:_The_build_fails_when_I_use_parallel_make.
